TABLE DOD_VENDOR_SETTINGS(
  row_id,                -- primary key
  vendor_id,             -- vendor id
  tenant_id,             -- tenant id

  setting_def_id,        -- references setting definition
  setting_key,           -- unique setting key
  setting_value,         -- setting value (text / json)

  context_id,            -- optional context
  trace,                 -- json trace/debug info

  status,                -- ACTIVE, INACTIVE
  deleted_state,         -- soft delete
  created,
  updated
)
